title: (Outdated) Cobblemon Missing Pokemon
description: Adds models, textures, animations, and spawning for a few pokemon that haven't yet been implemented in the base mod.
body:
**OUTDATED** as of Cobblemon 1.5, as every Pokemon this mod adds is now part of the base mod (with different, better models from the official mod of course)! A resource/data pack for Cobblemon 1.3 that adds a small handful of Pokemon that have not yet been implemented into the base mod. Each Pokemon in this addon will have models, textures (shinies included!), animations, and places to spawn!
## Currently Adds: - Trapinch, Vibrava, and Flygon. - All spawn in any desert during a clear day. - Trapinch prefers dark/shaded places where it cannot see the sky, such as shallow caves. - Tropius. - Spawns in jungles, especially during rain.
### How to Install Place a copy of the .zip folder in both your resourcepacks folder and in the world's datapacks folder (found in saves/worldname/datapacks)
### IMPORTANT NOTE This is NOT compatible with any other resource packs that add any of the same pokemon. For example, flygon: If you have two packs that add the same pokemon, pick your favorite of the two models and delete the files in the pack for the one you do not want. The easiest way to do this would probably be by searching "flygon" in the pack folder and deleting whatever comes up.
